title: Consolidate XDG_RUNTIME code

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

juts dropping this comment here that there is another runtime dir function in c/common: https://github.com/containers/common/blob/116177bb4c79804720002cb2402151a6cb005cc7/pkg/util/util_supported.go#L31

That should be replaced and tested as well, I tried in the past and it failed and got reverted: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13391. Of course as usual with no explaining as of why.
